headline: Leidos Holdings (LDOS) Stock Could Be 40.7% Undervalued After Defense Program Downgrade
summary: Leidos Holdings (LDOS) stock has come under pressure after the Defense Health Agency signaled plans to reduce reliance on the company as lead integrator for its electronic health record program, prompting downgrades from Jefferies and BofA Securities. See our latest analysis for Leidos Holdings. At a share price of $108.67, Leidos Holdings has seen momentum fade, with the 7-day share price return declining 10.70% and the 90-day share price return down 34.52%, although the 3-year total...

headline: Does Leidos (LDOS) Cloud Tool Rollout Reframe Its Defense Tech Edge Amid Health IT Questions?
summary: In early June 2026, the Defense Information Systems Agency and U.S. Space Command, working with Leidos, deployed the cloud-based Joint Management Tool, giving combatant commands real-time visibility into global satellite communications and sharply cutting the time needed for command-level reporting and analysis. This rollout highlights Leidos’ role in modernizing military communications with modular, commercial-off-the-shelf software that can be rapidly updated as operational requirements...
